name: feednest-mcp
description: FeedNest MCP server client libraries — SDK, tool definitions, and OpenClaw plugin

scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/sdk && npm run build -w packages/shared-tool-defs && npm run build -w packages/openclaw-plugin
scripts.test: npm run test -w packages/sdk && npm run test:run -w packages/shared-tool-defs && npm run test:run -w packages/openclaw-plugin
scripts.type-check: npm run type-check -w packages/sdk && npm run type-check -w packages/shared-tool-defs && npm run type-check -w packages/openclaw-plugin
